scope: Strict distress and Mayday language for M3 corpus growth, kept separate from Pan-Pan urgency, Securite safety, onboard emergency action, and ordinary traffic calls.

qa_notes.linguist_note: Distress is the grave and imminent danger category, not Pan-Pan urgency or Securite safety.
Mayday is the distress signal and must not accept Pan-Pan or Securite.
Relay is forwarding a distress message, not reading back or simply repeating.
Position is the vessel location in distress reporting, not course or bearing.
Listing is angle of heel, not sinking, grounding, or collision.
Sinking is loss of buoyancy and must stay separate from disabled or drifting.
Aground is a casualty state, not normal anchoring or alongside status.
Abandon is distress vessel abandonment, not routine disembarkation.
Liferaft is survival craft, not personal flotation or a rescue boat.
Rescue is distress-level help and must not be reduced to routine assistance or towage.
The signal word itself is Mayday, not the category word distress.
Mayday relay is used when forwarding another station's distress, not own distress or Pan-Pan.
Distress message position must not accept course, destination, or bearing alone.
Identity fields remain separate because distress format uses name, call sign, and MMSI distinctly.
Call sign should not absorb vessel name or MMSI answers.
MMSI is a maritime identity number, not a phone number or position.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: nature of distress / nature of urgency / safety warning
qa_notes.linguist_note: Nature of distress is a Mayday content field, not Pan-Pan or Securite language.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: fire on board / fire drill / fire pump
qa_notes.linguist_note: Fire on board is casualty content, not drill or onboard equipment action.
Flooding is ingress of water, not sinking state or water depth report.
Collision is actual casualty, not near miss or general traffic risk.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: medical emergency / medical advice / first aid
qa_notes.linguist_note: Medical emergency can be distress-level; medical advice alone is often urgency and must stay separate.
Immediate assistance signals distress urgency, not routine help or ordinary towage.
Rescue must not accept port-service requests.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: persons on board / persons overboard / crew on watch
qa_notes.linguist_note: Persons on board is distress count field, not man-overboard or watch crew.
Abandoning vessel is distress survival action, not port departure or passenger disembarkation.
Read back is confirmation, not relay, repeat request, or cancellation.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: silence Mayday / cancel Mayday / radio check
qa_notes.linguist_note: Distress traffic silence control is not cancellation or normal radio check.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Mayday three times / Pan-Pan three times / Securite three times
qa_notes.linguist_note: Distress signal repetition must not accept urgency, safety, or single-word incomplete signal.
Identity line must name the distressed vessel, not marina, pilot, or generic calling phrase.

items.source_text: Моя позиция четыре пять пять ноль север, ноль один три один ноль восток.
items.target_text: My position is four five five zero north, zero one three one zero east.
accepted_answers: My position is four five five zero north, zero one three one zero east.
Position four five five zero north zero one three one zero east

should_accept: My position is four five five zero north, zero one three one zero east.
Position four five five zero north zero one three one zero east
should_reject: My course is four five five zero north
My destination is zero one three one zero east
Position four five north zero one east
qa_notes.linguist_note: Coordinate content must stay exact enough for distress location and separate from course/destination.

items.source_text: Моя позиция: пеленг ноль девять ноль, дистанция две мили от маяка.
items.target_text: My position is bearing zero nine zero, distance two miles from the lighthouse.
accepted_answers: My position is bearing zero nine zero, distance two miles from the lighthouse.
Position bearing zero nine zero distance two miles from the lighthouse

should_accept: My position is bearing zero nine zero, distance two miles from the lighthouse.
Position bearing zero nine zero distance two miles from the lighthouse
should_reject: My course is zero nine zero
Distance two cables from the marina
Bearing one eight zero distance two miles
qa_notes.linguist_note: Bearing-distance position must not collapse into course or wrong distance details.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: fire casualty / fire drill / fire pump
qa_notes.linguist_note: Fire casualty language must stay separate from drill and onboard action commands.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: taking water / drinking water / water depth
qa_notes.linguist_note: Taking water means flooding ingress, not potable water, depth, or fuel.
Sinking is a distinct distress state and must not accept listing, drifting, or disabled.
Aground casualty state must not accept normal navigational status.

accepted_answers: We had a collision with another vessel.

should_accept: We had a collision with another vessel.
should_reject: Risk of collision with another vessel
dangerous_minimal_pairs: actual collision / risk of collision / collision course
qa_notes.linguist_note: Actual collision casualty must not accept traffic-risk phrases.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: man overboard / persons on board / crew on board
qa_notes.linguist_note: Overboard casualty must not accept persons-on-board count language.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: immediate assistance / routine assistance / information request
qa_notes.linguist_note: Immediate assistance in Mayday context must not accept routine port-service requests.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: immediate medical assistance / medical advice / first aid
qa_notes.linguist_note: Distress medical assistance must stay stricter than ordinary medical advice.
Rescue is emergency help, not towage, pilotage, or berthing.

items.target_text: Towage is not enough, rescue required.
accepted_answers: Towage is not enough, rescue required.
Towing is not enough rescue required

should_accept: Towage is not enough, rescue required.
Towing is not enough rescue required
qa_notes.linguist_note: This item marks escalation beyond towage and must not accept ordinary tug requests.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: persons on board / persons overboard / crew on watch
qa_notes.linguist_note: Distress persons count must preserve number and on-board status.

items.target_text: We are abandoning vessel to liferaft.
accepted_answers: We are abandoning vessel to liferaft.
We are abandoning ship to life raft.

should_accept: We are abandoning vessel to liferaft.
We are abandoning ship to life raft.
dangerous_minimal_pairs: abandoning vessel / leaving berth / launching boat
qa_notes.linguist_note: Abandoning to liferaft is survival action, not routine departure or pilot-boat operation.
Liferaft launch status must not accept lifejacket, rescue boat, or pilot boat.

items.target_text: Read back position and nature of distress.
accepted_answers: Read back position and nature of distress.
Read back the position and nature of distress.

should_accept: Read back position and nature of distress.
Read back the position and nature of distress.
should_reject: Relay position and nature of distress
qa_notes.linguist_note: Readback request must not accept relay, say-again, or safety warning readback.

accepted_answers: May day relay from vessel Orion.

should_accept: May day relay from vessel Orion.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Relay source must stay explicit and not collapse into own Mayday or Pan-Pan relay.

should_reject: Keep listening watch for safety traffic
dangerous_minimal_pairs: distress silence / listening watch / routine traffic
qa_notes.linguist_note: Distress traffic silence must not accept safety listening-watch or routine traffic language.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: false distress alert / active Mayday / test alert
qa_notes.linguist_note: False alert cancellation must not teach cancellation of a real Mayday without precise context.

items.source_text: Мэйдэй, это судно Аврора, позиция ноль девять ноль от маяка, пожар на борту, требуется немедленная помощь.
items.target_text: Mayday, this is vessel Aurora, position bearing zero nine zero from the lighthouse, fire on board, I require immediate assistance.
accepted_answers: Mayday, this is vessel Aurora, position bearing zero nine zero from the lighthouse, fire on board, I require immediate assistance.
Mayday this is vessel Aurora position bearing zero nine zero from the lighthouse fire on board we require immediate assistance

should_accept: Mayday, this is vessel Aurora, position bearing zero nine zero from the lighthouse, fire on board, I require immediate assistance.
Mayday this is vessel Aurora position bearing zero nine zero from the lighthouse fire on board we require immediate assistance
should_reject: Pan-Pan this is vessel Aurora position bearing zero nine zero from the lighthouse fire on board
Securite this is vessel Aurora navigation warning fire on board
Mayday this is vessel Aurora destination marina fire drill
qa_notes.linguist_note: Complete distress call keeps signal, identity, position, nature, and assistance fields strict.

items.source_text: Всем станциям: освободите канал для трафика бедствия.
items.target_text: All stations, keep clear for distress traffic.
accepted_answers: All stations, keep clear for distress traffic.
All stations, clear the channel for distress traffic.

should_accept: All stations, keep clear for distress traffic.
All stations, clear the channel for distress traffic.
should_reject: All stations keep listening watch for safety
All stations switch to marina channel
dangerous_minimal_pairs: distress traffic / safety watch / routine traffic
qa_notes.linguist_note: Distress traffic channel control must not accept safety watch or marina traffic instructions.

examples: My position is four five five zero north, zero one three one zero east.

grammar_patterns.pattern: distress position by bearing and distance
examples: My position is bearing zero nine zero, distance two miles from the lighthouse.
We are abandoning vessel to liferaft.

grammar_patterns.pattern: read back distress position and nature
examples: Read back position and nature of distress.

grammar_patterns.pattern: complete Mayday call with identity position nature and assistance
examples: Mayday, this is vessel Aurora, position bearing zero nine zero from the lighthouse, fire on board, I require immediate assistance.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Distress, urgency, and safety signals must remain strict.
Mayday distress language must not weaken Pan-Pan or Securite boundaries.
Relay means forwarding another station's distress and must not collapse into own distress or urgency relay.

phrase_distress_my_position_4550n_01310e: My position is four five five zero north, zero one three one zero east.
My course is four five five zero north
My destination is zero one three one zero east
Position four five north zero one east

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Distress location information must stay distinct from course, bearing, and destination data.
Distress identity fields are separate and should not be interchangeable.

phrase_distress_tow_not_enough_001: Towage is not enough, rescue required.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Rescue-level distress help must stay above port-service and towage language.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.pair: persons on board / persons overboard / abandoning vessel
dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: People-count, overboard, and abandoning-vessel concepts must not merge.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.pair: read back / relay / say again / cancel

phrase_distress_read_back_position_natur: Read back position and nature of distress.
Relay position and nature of distress

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Distress workflow verbs have different operational meanings.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.pair: distress traffic / safety watch / routine traffic

phrase_distress_all_stations_keep_clear_: All stations, keep clear for distress traffic.

phrase_distress_silence_distress_traffic: Keep listening watch for safety traffic
phrase_distress_all_stations_keep_clear_: All stations keep listening watch for safety
All stations switch to marina channel

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Distress channel protection is not Securite listening watch or normal traffic.

producer_notes: Draft keeps Mayday distress separate from Pan-Pan urgency, Securite safety, and onboard emergency actions.
Distress relay, readback, cancellation of false alert, and traffic silence are intentionally strict and routed to linguist review before merge.
No starter, regression, matcher, API/runtime, UI, Atlas, auth, router, registry, production, Watch Officer, or Nav Desk files changed.
